## Summary

What is unclear, missing, misleading, or worth expanding?

## Type

- Docs fix
- API clarification
- Example improvement
- Starter kit
- Migration guidance
- Other

## Current state

Which page, snippet, or section is involved?

## Proposed change

What should the reader see instead?

## Why this helps

How will this improve adoption, correctness, or trust?

## Notes / references

Links, file paths, screenshots, or related issues.
